Calendar.description:
Represents a single Google Calendar (the container, not an event within it).

Distinct from CalendarEvent — this models the calendar itself.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Google Calendar record
id.title: Id

summary.description: Display name or title of the calendar
summary.title: Summary

access_role.description: The current user's permission level for this calendar
access_role.title: Access Role

hidden.description: Indicates whether the calendar is hidden from view
hidden.title: Hidden

deleted.description: Indicates whether the calendar has been removed
deleted.title: Deleted

time_zone.description: Time zone associated with the calendar
time_zone.title: Time Zone

primary.description: True if this is the user's primary calendar
primary.title: Primary

Calendar.title: Calendar

CalendarEvent.description:
Represents a single event entry in Google Calendar.

Field names are aligned with what the GoogleCalendarCLIAPI expects.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Google Calendar record
id.title: Id

calendarid.description: ID of the calendar this event belongs to
calendarid.title: Calendarid

created.description: When the event was created, in ISO 8601 format
created.title: Created

start__dateTime.description: Date and time the event begins
start__dateTime.title: Start  Datetime

end__dateTime.description: Date and time the event ends
end__dateTime.title: End  Datetime

summary.description: Short title or name of the event
summary.title: Summary

location.description: Physical or virtual location of the event
location.title: Location

all_day.description: Set to True for events that span a full day without a specific time
all_day.title: All Day

attendees.description: Email addresses of people invited to the event
attendees.title: Attendees

organizer_email.description: Email address of the event organizer
organizer_email.title: Organizer Email

conferencing.description: Whether to include a video conferencing link
conferencing.title: Conferencing

recurrence_until.description: Date after which the event stops repeating
recurrence_until.title: Recurrence Until

recurrence_count.description: Total number of occurrences before the event stops
recurrence_count.title: Recurrence Count

visibility.description: Who can see the event details
visibility.title: Visibility

transparency.description: Whether the event blocks time (opaque) or leaves it free (transparent)
transparency.title: Transparency

colorId.description: Color label ID for the event
colorId.title: Colorid

reminders__useDefault.description: Whether to use the calendar's default reminder settings
reminders__useDefault.title: Reminders  Usedefault

reminders_minutes.description: How many minutes before the event to send reminders
reminders_minutes.title: Reminders Minutes

recurring.description: True if the event is part of a recurring series
recurring.title: Recurring

guestsCanModify.description: Whether invited guests are allowed to edit the event
guestsCanModify.title: Guestscanmodify

CalendarEvent.title: CalendarEvent

description: Holds the full Google Calendar application state, including all object collections.
title: GoogleCalendarState
